<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Spravato, in combination with a SSRI or SNRI, is indicated for adults with treatment-resistant Major Depressive Disorder, who have not responded to at least two different treatments with...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>dysthymic disorder（99.8%）</li>
<li>anxiety disorder（99.7%）</li>
<li>agoraphobia（99.6%）</li>
<li>benign paroxysmal torticollis of infancy（99.5%）</li>
<li>neurotic disorder（98.8%）</li>
<li>neurotic depression（97.8%）</li>
<li>melancholia（97.7%）</li>
<li>vitamin B12-responsive methylmalonic acidemia（97.3%）</li>
<li>obsessive-compulsive disorder（97.3%）</li>
<li>Keppen-Lubinsky syndrome（97.2%）</li>
<li>insomnia (disease)（96.4%）</li>
<li>congenital isolated adrenocorticotropic hormone deficiency (disease)（96.0%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant slowed nerve conduction velocity（95.5%）</li>
<li>schizoid personality disorder（95.4%）</li>
<li>histrionic personality disorder (disease)（95.4%）</li>
<li>schizotypal personality disorder（95.4%）</li>
<li>paranoid personality disorder（95.4%）</li>
<li>Ohdo syndrome and variants（94.8%）</li>
<li>blepharophimosis - intellectual disability syndrome, Ohdo type（93.5%）</li>
<li>narcissistic personality disorder（91.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
